auth_description: Optional. Without key: 40 req/min, 1K/day. With key: 240 req/min, 120K/day. Get a free key at https://open.fda.gov/apis/authentication/

novel_features.name: Drug Event Signal Tracking
novel_features.description: Track adverse event signal over time for a drug — spot emerging safety signals by charting report frequency across quarters or years

novel_features.name: Drug Reaction Comparison
novel_features.description: Compare adverse reaction profiles between two drugs side-by-side — see which reactions are unique to each and which overlap

novel_features.name: Reaction Co-occurrence
novel_features.description: Find reaction co-occurrence patterns for a drug — which side effects tend to appear together in the same report

novel_features.name: Polypharmacy Analysis
novel_features.description: Analyze adverse events for drug combinations — find safety signals that only appear when specific drugs are taken together

novel_features.name: Recall-Event Correlation
novel_features.description: Correlate drug recall enforcement actions with adverse event report spikes — see if recalls follow signal escalation

novel_features.name: Device Inventory Risk Check
novel_features.description: Check a CSV inventory of medical devices against FDA recall and adverse event databases — flag devices with active safety concerns

novel_features.name: Manufacturer Dossier
novel_features.description: Build a cross-domain intelligence dossier for any manufacturer — recalls, adverse events, 510(k) clearances, and PMA approvals aggregated in one view
